---
title: "vitals_spoke.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\vitals_spoke.py"
loc: 17
complexity: 3
logic_score: 9.02
style_score: 3.97
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 6.39
---

## Intent
The `vitals_spoke.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on get_vitals. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via get_vitals. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 10 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.cstar.core.rpc](file://src.cstar.core.rpc)

### Exports
- `get_vitals`
